app.title: Color Mixing Assistant
app.subtitle: This app helps you mix paints toward a target color. On the first camera, pick the color you want to match — on a miniature, character photo, or any other reference. On the second, sample the color currently on your palette or a test swatch on scrap material. The app suggests which base paints to add to move the palette color closer to the target.
app.subtitleLimits: It does not compensate for lighting, control camera focus, or know how much paint is on the palette or how strong your pigments are — it only points you in the right direction for adjusting the hue.

camera.placeholder: Select a camera, upload an image, or allow access in the browser
camera.heldHint: Snapshot — compare the marker with the color on screen
camera.roiHintLive: Color sampling region on the frame

roi.polygonOpen: Click points on the frame. Close by clicking the first point.

bases.title: Base colors
bases.subtitle: Choose a set for mix hints. Your presets are stored in the browser.
bases.makeNewPreset: Save current colors as new preset
bases.saveModalHint: Saves the colors currently shown in the list below.
bases.saveModalOverwrite: Preset «{{name}}» already exists — saving will overwrite it.
bases.removeColorDisabled: Cannot remove colors from a server preset
bases.removeColorMin: At least {{min}} colors must remain in the set
bases.exportHint: Export saves all your color sets in one file.
bases.importHint: Import loads user color sets. When names match existing user color sets, those sets will be overwritten.
bases.importConfirmOverwrite: Import? {{count}} preset(s) with matching names will be overwritten.

mix.title: Mixing and comparison
mix.deltaEHint: Visual difference: <2 — almost match, 2–5 — noticeable, >10 — very different.
mix.pigmentsTitle: Which pigments to add to the palette
mix.pigmentsIntro: Up to three paints from your set that best shift the current palette color toward the sample. Percents are relative importance, not exact volumes.
mix.startWith: Start with {{name}} ({{percent}}%) — add gradually and re-sample the palette.
mix.closeColors: Colors are already close — no meaningful additions from the set.
mix.legend: Percents are relative pigment contribution toward the target, not exact paint volumes. Sum is 100% for listed rows.

errors.matchNeedsColors: Target and palette colors are required
errors.noMediaDevices: Browser does not support camera access
errors.imageInvalid: Choose an image file (JPEG, PNG, etc.)
